scripts.dev:api: node scripts/validate-env.mjs api && npm run dev -w @sipnews/api
scripts.dev:web: node scripts/validate-env.mjs web && npm run dev -w @sipnews/web -- --port 3001
scripts.dev:worker: node scripts/validate-env.mjs worker && npm run dev -w @sipnews/worker
scripts.verify:fast: npm run test:unit && npm run typecheck
scripts.verify: npm run test:unit && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.run:worker:prepare: node scripts/validate-env.mjs worker-runtime && npm run run:prepare -w @sipnews/worker
scripts.run:worker:deliver: node scripts/validate-env.mjs worker-runtime && npm run run:deliver -w @sipnews/worker
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const path of ['dist','apps/api/dist','apps/web/.next','apps/worker/dist','packages/contracts/dist','packages/core/dist','packages/data/dist','packages/config/dist']) fs.rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.worker:prepare: node scripts/validate-env.mjs worker && npm run build:worker && npm run run:worker:prepare
scripts.worker:deliver: node scripts/validate-env.mjs worker && npm run build:worker && npm run run:worker:deliver
scripts.db:setup: npm run env:check:seed && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed:first-user
